meta.title: The conquest of malaria in Italy
meta.sourceDoc: 50. P2 - The conquest of malaria in Italy 意大利疟疾防治.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The conquest of malaria in Italy 意大利疟疾防治

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：insects
PDF 定位/解析：家没能把症疾和昆虫（蚊虫）联系起来。

题目 15
答案：miasma
PDF 定位/解析：段B第1句："..subscribedtothetheoryof'miasma'or"poisoningoftheair!"-当时最流行的观点即"瘴气理论"。

题目 16
答案：hereditary
PDF 定位/解析：段B倒数第2句："..giventhewidespreadbeliefthatmalariawashereditary."-疮疾被误认为是遗传病。

题目 17
答案：life expectancy
PDF 定位/解析：段B中部："In warm,damp,malarial zones,the life expectancy of land workerswas a terrifying 22.5 years."-农村痣 疾区的平均寿命极短。

questionSections.text:
题目 18
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：段C只提到"healthyhumanvolunteers"，并未说明这些志愿者"来自意大利各地"。故信息缺失。

题目 19
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析：段C末句：... healthypeoplewere introduced into malarial zonesbutkept freeof mosquito bites-and remained well."-证明在 疟疾区如果避免蚊咬，仍可保持健康。

题目 20
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：段E首句指出原本打算向所有易感地区居民发放奎宁，"peasantswereoftensuspiciousofmedicine...refusaltoacceptthe treatment"，并未做到"成功地给所有居民服用"。

items.text:
题目 18
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：段C只提到"healthyhumanvolunteers"，并未说明这些志愿者"来自意大利各地"。故信息缺失。

题目 19
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析：段C末句：... healthypeoplewere introduced into malarial zonesbutkept freeof mosquito bites-and remained well."-证明在 疟疾区如果避免蚊咬，仍可保持健康。

题目 20
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：段E首句指出原本打算向所有易感地区居民发放奎宁，"peasantswereoftensuspiciousofmedicine...refusaltoacceptthe treatment"，并未做到"成功地给所有居民服用"。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：E
PDF 定位：Deaths from malaria fell by some 80 % in the first decade of the 2oth century... (奎宁）计划的成效。
PDF 解析：一给出"80%"这一显著数据，说明药物

题目 22
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析："Giovanni Battista Grassi demonstrated that the micro-organisms...were carried in the digestive tract of the mosquito." 一揭示传播途径。

题目 23
答案：F
PDF 定位/解析："the country's leading malariologist Alberto Missiroli refused to order the distribution of quinine, so allowing the epidemic to spread unchecked... 一专家主动不制疫情。

题目 24
答案：H
PDF 定位/解析："As there are still more than 1 m deaths every year from malaria worldwide, Snowden's book also has contemporary relevance." 说明对当今读者的重要性。

题目 25
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：列举两大错误假设：miasmatheory及"疟疾是遗传病"。

题目 26
答案：D
PDF 定位："Italy introduced a quinine law and a quinine tax in 1904 ..."
PDF 解析：一提到立法支持抗痣。
